metadata.description: mnemo — the trust layer for AI agent self-improvement, native to Claude Code

plugins.name: mnemo
plugins.description: Self-improving memory + skills for Claude Code where you can trust what it learned: every lesson carries provenance + a trust score, is challenged by an independent verifier before it sticks (poisoned ones quarantined), and is re-checked by a falsifiable probe. Bounded, auditable, on your own subscription.
